name: BattlefieldAnalysisBaseDeliver
description: Allow battlefield analysis base to deliver items to mech, courier, and logistic tower. Automatically deliver space warpers to interstellar logistic tower when the base has stock. And retrieve items from supply dispenser to input area when the base has stock. 允许战场分析基站直接派遣无人机向机甲、物流塔、配送器配送战利品。并且在有库存的时候给星际物流塔自动送空间翘曲器。并且在有库存的时候从供应配送器拉货到输入区。
